description_long: This kiosk features a modern, open-plan design with a rectangular base and a prominent overhead hanging sign displaying the MESI logo. The main structure includes a large, white counter with branding, a seating area with round tables and stools, and a black partition wall that provides a backdrop for the seating area. The rear wall is adorned with a large printed graphic showing people and text, serving as an eye-catching promotional display. The materials appear to be primarily smooth, glossy plastic or composite panels, with metallic supports and some glass or acrylic elements. The overall aesthetic is sleek and professional, suitable for use as a trade show booth or urban information kiosk.
description: A sleek, modern kiosk with a large branded counter, seating area, black partition wall, and a suspended overhead sign. The design features glossy surfaces and prominent promotional graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large printed graphic on the rear wall, the overhead MESI sign, and the side profile of the counter and partition wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the seating area with round tables and stools, the black partition wall, and the full length of the counter.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the counter, the seating area, and the alignment of the overhead sign with the kiosk layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the counter, seating area, and the black partition wall from a different angle.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo on overhead suspended panel and counter front; large printed promotional graphic on rear wall; visible text includes 'MESI' and a slogan.
attribute_roof_design: No physical roof; features a suspended, rectangular overhead sign with smooth, glossy surfaces.
attribute_architectural_style: modern, minimalist, trade show booth style
